Review: Is a zero rating possible. This egg is horrible. First off it sounds like a smoke detected siren. Second it is jerry rigged inside and hot glued together. Good luck hiding something inside it and it being food safe. Also my visually impaired daughter is down right scared by this egg. Will not recommend and would recommend the talking egg or chirping eggs from other sellers on Amazon instead. and the price is OUTRAGEOUS

Review: my gums implore you, go with another brand. i give them a star for being a flosser, and they will get in the teeth. and another as they have a nice fold down pick part, and they have a carrier plastic pouch in there to take them on the go, its reusable so dont lose it. now, they will get stuck in tight teeth. then shred. and they are a bit thin, so watch those gums. they are painful on the gums. i would pass on these. unless you use them for that one tooth that catches meat every time you eat, they will do that. but if you think you can go around all 32, nope. this is a product I wont try again.

Review: PROs: The product arrived at my house sooner then expected like most AMAZON stuff. It worked ONCE. CONs: It's NOT working! I've replaced the wire = still doesn't work. I've replaced the pads = still doesn't work. I've tried every channel = still doesn't work. I've recharged it = still doesn't work. The screen lights. The TIMER counts down. The 'CH', 'TENS' & the chosen TENs' ICON MODE blinks/flashes; but, NO FEELing!!! I WISHED I had bought the TENs & EMS unit from the company that made my TIGHT for LIFE KEGEL 8 unit that still works after 20 years of use w/ a 9v battery.
validation.target_text: TENS unit stops working after one use

Review: This is one of the worst processed curly hair i have purchaced .. it literally turned into a matted ball... i turned it into a wig not a sew in and it should last longer... nope had to turn this wig into a permanent low bun ball until i order from another company... at first the hair looks and feels great ... then the shedding and mating starts.. i didn't cut the wefts ... the nape area is the worst... not even sillicone mix can save it... these reviews are very misleading . the hair will not last you more than 2 months as a wig only wearing it a few times . But u guess you get what you pay for
